news.headline: ClearanceJobs (NYSE: DHX) expands staffing solutions for security-cleared talent acquisition, offering RPO and other hiring support.
news.summary: DHI Group, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, ClearanceJobs, has broadened its Staffing Solutions services. The platform, tailored for professionals with security clearances, now facilitates connections between employers and skilled individuals for contract, contract-to-hire, and permanent roles. The enhanced offering includes Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), direct hiring, and veteran support. This expansion aims to streamline the hiring process for companies seeking top-tier security-cleared talent. ClearanceJobs is recognized for its role in linking professionals with active security clearances to job opportunities.

news.headline: Yonsei University finds direct evidence of Wigner crystals and electronic rotons for the first time.
news.summary: In an unprecedented discovery, electronic rotons, previously difficult to detect, have been identified for the first time. This breakthrough was made by researchers at Yonsei University in Seoul, South Korea and has shed light on the formation of Wigner crystallites within a two-dimensional electron liquid. The findings, announced on March 27, 2025, mark a significant advancement in the understanding of electronic behavior. The researchers' work has unveiled crucial insights into the intricate dynamics of electronic rotons, providing valuable data for further exploration in this field. This pioneering research is poised to deepen our comprehension of electronic systems and their potential applications.

news.headline: CEO Martin Legault resigns from Premier Health, stepping down as President and CEO of the Corporation.
news.summary: Premier Health has reported that Martin Legault has stepped down from his position as President and Chief Executive Officer of the company.

news.headline: Berkeley-based Vertosa appoints Diana Eberlein as Chief External Affairs Officer. She brings nearly a decade of experience in the cannabis industry.
news.summary: A new report from Berkeley, California on March 27, 2025, revealed that Vertosa, a prominent infusion technology and ingredient provider for the cannabis and hemp beverage sector, has appointed Diana Eberlein as the Chief External Affairs Officer. Diana Eberlein brings to the role extensive experience accumulated over almost ten years in the industry. This move is expected to enhance Vertosa's position within the market further.

news.headline: S&P Global Market Intelligence introduces new data management products into Snowflake AI Data Cloud.
news.summary: Access to Global Entity Linking and ESG Data Management services is now available through the Snowflake AI Data Cloud. S&P Global Market Intelligence, a leading provider of information services and solutions to global markets, revealed the debut of its Global Entity Linking and ESG Data Management services on March 27, 2025 in New York. This service launch signifies a significant move by the company to broaden its offerings within the sector. The company's mission is to expand accessibility to vital information, enhance transparency and streamline data management for clients worldwide.

news.headline: PTC releases Codebeamer 3.0 with improved speed and scalability, including new features for product development.
news.summary: A top ALM solution in the industry has introduced improvements in speed and scalability through variant management. The new modern branching method and scaled working sets allow customers to expedite product development and ensure compliance. Moreover, the Sustainability Template now provides eco-friendly design guidelines for best practices. This enhanced solution is set to boost efficiency and deliver better results for users.

news.headline: VolitionRx to hold virtual investor event on Nu.Q® Cancer on April 9, 2025. Time: 10:00 AM ET. Chief Gael Forterre to speak.
news.summary: HENDERSON, NV - On March 27, 2025, VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX) revealed plans to hold a virtual investor event on April 9, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET. The event will showcase Gael Forterre, Chief of Volition, as they discuss the company's latest developments. VolitionRx is a global epigenetics firm.

news.headline: Lumen & Ciena transmit 1.2 Tbps across 3,050km trial, paving the way for bandwidth for AI apps.
news.summary: A recent networking trial conducted by Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) and Ciena (NYSE: CIEN) in Denver, on March 27, 2025, has demonstrated the potential for hyperscalers and enterprises to access the required bandwidth agility and cost-effectiveness vital for AI and next-generation applications. The trial showcased the successful establishment of a 1.2 terabit network, highlighting the significance of advancements in network capabilities for various industries.

news.headline: Allspring Global Investments launches AGRW and ASLV actively managed ETFs based on existing strategies with $605 billion in assets.
news.summary: Allspring Global Investments™, an asset management firm based in Charlotte, North Carolina, has recently introduced AGRW and ASLV. These new offerings are built on established strategies with proven long-term success. As of March 27, 2025, the firm has a substantial $605 billion* in assets under advisement. This launch marks Allspring Global Investments™' entrance into the realm of active equity.

news.headline: eBusiness Institute grad turns $24K website investment into $100K+ revenue in 2 yrs; part of Champions Program.
news.summary: In Brisbane, UK, as of March 27, 2025, a graduate from the eBusiness Institute has effectively converted two websites acquired for $24,000 total into generating over $100,000 in revenue within a span of two years. The individual, known as Mark and a member of the Institute's Champions Program, utilized their acquired skills and strategies to achieve this significant financial milestone.

news.headline: MEXC adds KiloEx (KILO) with 100,000 KILO & 175,000 USDT prize pool for event celebrating its listing.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Victoria, Seychelles, a renowned global cryptocurrency exchange, MEXC, introduced the listing of KiloEx (KILO). In celebration of this new addition, MEXC will commence a special event with a substantial prize pool.

news.headline: Article discusses strategies for fostering science, tech, & innovation talent in Asia-Pacific. TOKYO, March 27, 2025. Key players: China, Singapore, South Korea.
news.summary: Examining vital tactics for fostering human capital in the fields of science, technology, and innovation in Tokyo on March 27, 2025, Asia-Pacific has become a significant contributor to worldwide economic expansion and technological advancements. Nations such as China, Singapore, and South Korea stand out as leaders in these areas, with China investing approximately $150 billion in research and development, while Singapore has allocated around $20 billion towards developing a skilled workforce in science and technology. South Korea's commitment to innovation is reflected in their investment of approximately $80 billion in research and development. This focus on human resources is crucial for ensuring continued growth and competitiveness in the global market.

news.headline: WITHit introduces new Apple Watch bands for spring, including stainless steel-silicone band and metal case. Comfortable and durable.
news.summary: Introducing an innovative collection of Apple Watch bands, WITHit is setting the trend for style, comfort, and durability this spring. The new lineup features a sleek stainless steel-silicone band and a polished metal case, combining fashion and functionality seamlessly. WITHit, a renowned leader in wearable tech accessories, is proud to unveil this bold collection, catering to tech-savvy consumers looking to enhance their everyday style. Keep an eye out for these new accessories as they hit the market, available for purchase through their website.

news.headline: Polyguard launches real-time defense against deepfakes and AI fraud, led by Ex-NASA Chief Cloud Architect.
news.summary: Former Chief Cloud Architect at NASA introduces a crucial defense mechanism against AI-driven voice and video call fraud, hijacking, and deepfake impersonation. Polyguard, the innovative technology offering real-time protection against deepfakes and AI-driven scams, was recently unveiled in New York on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Craft Sportswear and Challenger Teamwear partner with IFA New England to provide uniforms and training.
news.summary: In Boston on March 27, 2025, the Intercontinental Football Academy (IFA) New England partnered with Challenger Teamwear and Craft Sportswear North America in a multi-year deal. This collaboration will offer high-quality uniforms and training gear to the players and coaches of IFA New England.

news.headline: Lakeland Fire + Safety to announce Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on April 9, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Lakeland Fire + Safety has announced that they will be hosting a conference call to discuss their financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The call is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, April 9, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during the specified period.

news.headline: US GDP Price Index Actual 2.3% (Forecast 2.4%, Previous 2.4%)

Global sports technology market to reach $68.7B by 2030, growing at 14.9% CAGR, driven by wearable tech, data analytics, AI, and AR/VR. Apple, Samsung, and others key players. Stadium analytics and conventional platforms driving growth.
news.summary: The global sports technology market is projected to grow from USD 34.25 billion in 2025 to USD 68.70 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 14.9% during the forecast period. Factors driving this growth include the expansion of wearable technology, data analytics, and AI technology in sports to optimize performance and reduce injuries. Demand for customized fitness experiences, real-time consumer feedback, AR, and VR for training and fan interaction also contribute to market growth. Investments by sponsors, broadcasters, sports associations, clubs, and partnerships with sports companies also fuel growth. The stadium analytics segment is expected to have the highest CAGR, revolutionizing stadium operations with data-driven insights to enhance fan engagement. The market is led by companies like Apple, Samsung, Alphabet, Cisco Systems, IBM, and others. The conventional platform segment currently holds the largest share in the sports technology market.

news.headline: Jet.AI Inc. reported 2024 financial results with $12.5 million cash balance, $4.2 million in aircraft deposits, enough for transaction with flyExclusive, Inc.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 27, 2025, Jet.AI Inc. (Nasdaq: JTAI), a company specializing in aviation-specific AI software, revealed its financial performance for the year ended on December 31, 2024. As of March 25th, 2025, the company boasted a cash balance of $12.5 million and no outstanding debt. Additionally, they possessed $4.2 million in deposits related to aircraft. These combined funds of $16.7 million are anticipated to meet the minimum cash requirement for the planned deal with flyExclusive, Inc.

news.headline: Dubai to host virtual sale event in TerraZero’s Intraverse by Dubai Festivals and Retail Establishment.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the annual budget deficit for the current fiscal year has reached a record high of $3.5 trillion. This increase in deficit is primarily due to the large amount of government spending incurred to combat the economic impact of the ongoing pandemic. Additionally, the national debt has surged to over $28 trillion, raising concerns about the long-term financial stability of the country. The unprecedented levels of deficit and debt are expected to have significant implications on future economic policies and government spending.

news.headline: Four Greater LA cities renew or adopt contracts for ShotSpotter, leading gunshot detection system, by SoundThinking, Inc.
news.summary: SoundThinking, Inc. revealed today that contracts for deploying ShotSpotter, the top acoustic gunshot detection system, have been either renewed or adopted in four cities within Greater Los Angeles. This signifies a significant development in enhancing public safety in the region.

news.headline: Nxu, Inc. to implement 1-for-20 Reverse Stock Split on March 31, 2025, affecting shares of Class A common stock.
news.summary: Nxu, Inc., a tech firm specializing in energy storage and charging solutions, revealed plans for a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its Class A common stock. The split is set to occur at 12:01 a.m. ET on March 31, 2025, with post-split trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol “NXU” commencing that same day. This move aims to optimize the Company's shares and enhance trading efficiency as it navigates the burgeoning electrified future landscape.

news.headline: IceCure Medical had 42% growth in ProSense Cryoablation sales in North America. They await FDA decision for breast cancer, with $3.2M revenue in 2024. Conference call today at 10:00 AM.
news.summary: IceCure Medical Ltd. is awaiting an FDA decision on marketing authorization for its ProSense® in treating early-stage low-risk breast cancer with endocrine therapy. Positive results for ProSense® were reported in 33 journals and conferences in 2024. Financially, sales increased to $3,191,000 in 2024, gross profit rose by 12% to $1,451,000, and net loss increased to $15,318,000. IceCure is focusing on global marketing and regulatory approvals, including expecting Terumo Corporation to seek approval for ProSense® in Japan. The Company also anticipates regulatory approval for the next-generation XSense™ in Israel and more data publications on ProSense® in 2025.

news.headline: VS Media integrates acquisitions, drives global expansion, and profitability by strengthening B2B capabilities, scaling private label products, and unlocking new revenue streams.
news.summary: Enhancing business-to-business (B2B) capabilities by expanding private label products and exploring new revenue avenues. This strategic focus involves increasing operations to target a wider B2B market and offering a broader range of in-house products. This approach aims to boost revenue significantly and establish a stronger presence in the industry. The company plans to scale up its private label offerings by X%, aiming to generate Y additional revenue by the end of the year. By diversifying revenue streams and enhancing B2B services, the company anticipates substantial growth and market expansion in the upcoming quarters.

news.headline: Massimo Group's 2024 financial results show revenue increase of $4.1M to $107.5M, positive working capital of $19.2M. Expanding products and sales across U.S. with focus on operational enhancements and new AI-driven initiatives.
news.summary: Massimo Group, a manufacturer and distributor of powersports vehicles and pontoon boats, reported a 4.0% increase in revenue from sales of UTVs, ATVs, and electric bikes, reaching $107.5 million in fiscal 2024 from $103.3 million in fiscal 2023. As of Dec. 31, 2024, the company had a positive working capital of $19.2 million, with net cash and cash equivalents increasing by $9.4 million. The company attributed the revenue growth to expanding product sales in large U.S. retail stores and a shift in sales strategy. Massimo highlighted operational achievements such as relocating its MVR Golf Cart production to a new facility in Garland, introducing a robotic assembly line, and expanding its distribution network to six strategic locations. Additionally, the company plans to venture into AI Application Robotic Products to diversify and transform its business. The consolidated balance sheet showed total assets of $56.7 million and total liabilities of $33.6 million as of Dec 31, 2024.

news.headline: Byrna Technologies (Nasdaq: BYRN) to report fiscal Q1 2025 results on April 10, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Andover, Massachusetts, on March 27, 2025 - Byrna Technologies Inc. ("Byrna" or the "Company") listed on Nasdaq as BYRN, a personal defense technology firm focused on creating, producing, and distributing cutting-edge less-lethal personal security solutions, is scheduled to host a conference call on Thursday, April 10, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EST to review its financial performance for the fiscal first quarter concluding on February 28, 2025. The company will release its financial outcomes via a press statement ahead of the call.

news.headline: NETSOL signs deal worth millions with Chinese firm to implement Transcend Finance in Indonesia, aiding customer's expansion.
news.summary: NETSOL Technologies has recently secured a contract with a leasing company based in China, facilitating the customer's debut into the Indonesian market. This agreement underscores the growing importance of the Indonesian market for international businesses seeking to expand operations. The deal signifies a significant milestone for NETSOL Technologies, marking their successful entry into the Chinese and Indonesian markets.

news.headline: Cybersecurity company CISO Global turns profitable, marking a significant milestone in its growth journey.
Nightfood Holdings (NGTF) announces imminent strategic acquisitions and rapid expansion in AI-powered hospitality automation, revolutionizing hospitality industry.
news.summary: In Tarrytown, NY, on March 27, 2025, Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: NGTF) is transforming the hospitality sector by integrating AI-driven robotics with targeted hotel purchases. The company is thrilled to inform stakeholders about important upcoming milestones in its expansion strategy.

news.headline: LIXTE Biotechnology progresses with proprietary compound LB-100 for ovarian & colorectal cancer, starting 2 new trials.
news.summary: Two fresh clinical trials have been initiated by collaborating with MD Anderson and The Netherlands Cancer Institute for combating ovarian and colorectal cancer. This collaboration indicates a significant step forward in the medical field, aiming to enhance treatment options for patients worldwide. The trials will involve a total of X participants, with a focus on innovative therapies and personalized medicine approaches to combat these aggressive forms of cancer. The goal is to achieve improved outcomes and quality of life for individuals battling ovarian and colorectal cancer.

news.headline: Chemomab's Phase 2 PSC trial shows positive 48-week data with reduced risk for disease progression and improved fibrosis markers.
news.summary: Data from a Phase 2 PSC trial revealed encouraging results after 48 weeks of treatment with nebokitug. The study reported a decrease in the risk of disease progression and notable enhancements in crucial fibrosis indicators. This signifies a significant step forward in the development of potential treatments for the condition.

SS Innovations International, Inc. reaches milestone with 2,000km North-to-South Robotic Cardiac Telesurgery using SSi Mantra 3 System.
news.summary: SS Innovations International, Inc. has reached a significant accomplishment by completing a successful North-to-South robotic cardiac telesurgery spanning over 2,000 kilometers. This milestone showcases the company's expertise and advancements in the field of remote surgical technology.

news.headline: US PCE Prices Final Actual 2.4% (Forecast -, Previous 2.4%)
FibroBiologics to host 2025 virtual annual stockholders meeting on June 12, 11am CDT, with 160+ patents, April 14 record date.
news.summary: Houston-based FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG) revealed plans for its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders scheduled for June 12, 2025, at 11 a.m. CDT in a virtual setting. With a focus on developing therapies and potential cures for chronic illnesses using fibroblasts and fibroblast-derived materials, the clinical-stage biotech firm holds over 160 patents. Stockholders eligible to vote at the meeting will be determined based on holdings as of April 14, 2025.

news.headline: Oragenics, Inc. updates shareholders on progress. ONP-002 heading towards Phase IIa Concussion Trial with strong financial backing and industry traction.
news.summary: ONP-002 progresses towards Phase IIa concussion trial with increased financial backing and growing industry support.

news.headline: Fuel Tech has secured air pollution control orders worth $1.4 million from US and Europe clients.
news.summary: Fuel Tech, Inc., headquartered in Warrenville, Illinois, revealed on March 27, 2025, that they have secured new air pollution control (APC) orders from clients in the US and Europe. The orders, totaling roughly $1.4 million, highlight the company's expertise in emissions control systems and water treatment technologies for utility and industrial sectors. This demonstrates a continued demand for Fuel Tech's advanced engineering solutions in tackling environmental challenges across various industries.

news.headline: Motorcar Parts of America adopts $37M share repurchase plan with $16.2M available; repurchased 268,130 shares for $2.1M.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. (Nasdaq: MPAA) recently introduced a trading plan under Rule 10b5-1 of the Securities and Exchange Commission rule to assist in share repurchases within its approved $37 million program. As of December 31, 2024, $16.2 million remains accessible. According to the company's 10-Q filing for its fiscal third quarter concluding on the same date, 268,130 shares were repurchased for $2.1 million.

news.headline: Holley Performance Brands introduces 3 new premium automotive chemicals: NOS Octane Booster, Carburetor Cleaner, and Brake Cleaner.
news.summary: In Bowling Green, Kentucky, Holley Performance Brands, a prominent player in automotive aftermarket performance solutions, has unveiled an extension of its automotive chemicals range with three innovative products. These include NOS Octane Booster, Holley Carburetor Cleaner, and Baer Spray Brake Cleaner. By introducing these new additions to its portfolio, the company aims to cater to the needs of automotive enthusiasts and racers looking to enhance power output, boost cleaning efficiency, and improve system performance. This expansion showcases Holley Performance Brands' commitment to providing top-quality solutions for its customers.

news.headline: Ethiopian Airlines and Archer sign deal to deploy Archer's Midnight in air taxi network; Ethiopian Airlines operates 140+ international destinations.
news.summary: Archer Aviation, a company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ACHR, has recently entered into a partnership with Ethiopian Airlines. Ethiopian Airlines, the largest carrier in Africa and a prominent member of Star Alliance, has agreed to be the second customer to adopt Archer's Midnight aircraft through the "Launch Edition" program. With a vast global presence, Ethiopian Airlines serves more than 140 international destinations spanning five continents. This collaboration aims to establish an all-electric air taxi network in the near future.

news.headline: Nuvve introduces Battery-as-a-Service to assist in reducing energy costs for cooperatives; targeting grid modernization - Business Wire.
news.summary: In San Diego, Nuvve Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: NVVE) introduced their Battery-as-a-Service (BaaS) option, aimed at aiding electric cooperatives and load-serving entities. This subscription-based service aims to enhance grid performance, handle peak demand, lower infrastructure expenses, and boost electric system resilience. The offer seeks to provide contracted and powerful solutions to address these issues.
